case_title: LINDA D. WASHINGTON VS. J.P.MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, LINDA D. AS TO DEFENDANT J.P.MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-02-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT J.P.MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, LINDA D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT J.P.MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC. PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH L. KASHANN STANTON (TITLE: PARALEGAL). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $804.03 FILED BY WASHINGTON, LINDA D. AS TO DEFENDANT J.P.MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT J.P.MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC.
